testcase.name: create_view
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //button[.//div[normalize-space()='Create View']] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//button[.//div[normalize-space()='Create View']]"}.
